stories.headline: Colombia presidential election heads to runoff between right-wing and left-wing candidates

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: El colombiano Abelardo de la Espriella, el candidato que prometió restablecer las relaciones diplomáticas con #Israel, abrir una embajada en Jerusalén y solicitar la colaboración de Israel en la lucha contra los cárteles de la droga, quedó primero por delante del izquierdista Iván Cepeda y ahora se dirigen ambos a una segunda vuelta decisiva.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🇨🇴 Petro warns of “mafia fascism,” calls for mass mobilization ahead of runoff

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Ay amigo Polo Polo, ¿Resucitó? Uribe fue a Ecuador y habló con Noboa y elevaron estúpidamente los aranceles a Colombia...

stories.headline: UK bars pro-Palestinian streamer Hasan Piker and uncle over Israel criticism

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: The pro-Palestinian American streamer Hasan Piker and his uncle say Britain's government has barred them from entering the country over their criticism of Israel.

stories.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah in Beirut after rocket attacks, Trump claims US-brokered ceasefire halt

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body:
🚨 BREAKING NEWS: Israel conducts military strikes against Hezbollah in Beirut, Lebanon, after Hezbollah launch at least 50 rockets into northern Israel
ISRAEL: "There will not be a situation where Hezbollah attacks and its terror HQ in Beirut remain out-of-bounds!"

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: President Trump says he spoke with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and there will be “no troops going to Beirut.” He also says the US spoke with Hezbollah and they agreed that “all shooting will stop” and “Israel will not attack them.”

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body:
🚨BREAKING: Huge Crowds In Tehran Raise Hezbollah Flags & Chant In Favour Of Resistance
A massive statement as Iran threatens Israel in the event of strikes in Beirut.

stories.headline: Bernie Sanders to introduce bill giving public 50% ownership stake in largest AI companies

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: AI is built on humanity’s collective knowledge. The wealth it generates must benefit humanity — not just Elon Musk, Sam Altman and other AI oligarchs. That’s why I’ll be introducing the American AI Sovereign Wealth Fund Act — to give the public a direct ownership stake.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: U.S. senator Bernie Sanders just said he will introduce a bill that would put a one-time 50% tax on OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI paid in stock, not cash. The government would get voting shares and an equal seat on each company's board, and the stock would fund a public fund owned by citizens.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: I will soon be introducing a bill to give the public a 50% ownership stake in the largest AI companies in America. This would guarantee that the trillions created by AI are used to improve the lives of all of us — and block oligarch decisions that harm the American people.

stories.headline: Trump says Iran agreed to no nuclear weapons in wide-ranging interview

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body:
"The one guarantee that I have to have is that there will be no nuclear weapons, they've agreed to that."

President Donald J. Trump talks Iran, ballroom construction and more in a wide ranging interview with Lara Trump. 🇺🇸

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body:
Now we know why trump still hasn’t been able to open the Straight of Hormuz.

It’s because, in the cognitively impaired mind of trump, Iran cleverly has the only Schrödinger military in the world: it exists and it doesn’t exist all at the same time.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 💥NEW: Dem Harold Ford Jr. on New Jersey Anti-ICE Rioters: “That place was open during the Obama Administration … for protesters to be outside engaging in this kind of violence, imparting these kind of threats to federal officials … Democrats, we have to say, ‘This is WRONG!’”

stories.body: Wow, Berkshire Hathaway investing $10 billion into $GOOGL in a private placement as part of a broader $80 billion equity capital raise by the company to expand its AI infrastructure

stories.headline: Bernie Sanders to introduce bill for public 50% ownership in major AI companies
stories.body:
BREAKING: Bernie Sanders will introduce a bill to have the public take a 50% ownership stake in the country's biggest AI companies.

The American AI Sovereign Wealth Fund Act would have the government tax AI companies, take 50% of the stock, and put it under public control.

stories.headline: Browns finalizing trade sending Myles Garrett to Rams
stories.body:
🚨🚨🚨

Bombshell: The Browns are finalizing a trade that will send two-time Defensive Player of the Year Myles Garrett to the Los Angeles Rams, per @rapsheet, @TomPelissero and me.

In exchange for Garrett, the Rams are expected to send Pro-Bowl edge Jared Verse, a 2027 first-round pick and other draft-pick compensation still being negotiated to the Browns.

stories.headline: Eagles trading WR A.J. Brown to Patriots
stories.body:
🚨🚨🚨

ESPN sources: The Eagles are trading Pro-Bowl WR A.J. Brown to the Patriots for a 2028 first-round pick and a 2027 fifth-round pick that is the better of New England’s two fifths. The deal that has been speculated on for weeks now finally is happening. Brown and Patriots HC Mike Vrabel are reuniting.

stories.headline: Browns trading DE Myles Garrett to Rams for EDGE Jared Verse and 2027 1st-round pick
stories.body: Browns trading DE Myles Garrett to Rams in exchange for EDGE Jared Verse and a 2027 1st-round pick. (via @RapSheet, @TomPelissero, @AdamSchefter)

stories.headline: Taylor Swift announces original song for Toy Story 5
stories.body:
It’s a *Toy* Story 🤠
You knew it! My new original song “I Knew It, I Knew You” for Disney and @Pixar’s @toystory 5 will be yours on June 5th. I’ve always dreamed of getting to write for these characters who I’ve adored since I was a 5 year old kid watching the first Toy Story movie. I fell instantly in love with Toy Story 5 when I was lucky enough to see it in its early stages, and I wrote this song as soon as I got home from the screening. Sometimes you just know, right?
You can pre-order now exclusively at https://t.co/NoneI6kxdH and catch Toy Story 5 in theaters June 19th ☁️☁️☁️☁️☁️

stories.headline: Pop Base reports Taylor Swift's new song returns to country roots
stories.body:
Taylor Swift’s new song ‘I Knew It, I Knew You’ for ‘Toy Story 5’ will mark a return to her country roots.

The song was written and produced by Taylor Swift and Jack Antonoff.

stories.headline: OUST partners with FieldAI to integrate Rev8 digital lidar into autonomous robots.
stories.body:
$OUST partnered with FieldAI to integrate its Rev8 digital lidar into autonomous robots operating in complex, unstructured environments.

The companies are targeting deployments across construction, mining, energy, manufacturing, security and government sectors.

stories.headline: AMD Ryzen AI Max+ now available with breakthrough local AI performance.
stories.body:
AMD Ryzen AI Max+ is available now.

16 cores. 32 threads. 40 compute units. 50 TOPS NPU. Up to 128GB unified memory.

Built on x86, it brings breakthrough local AI performance to the enterprise and developer workflows teams already use. No translation layer, no performance penalty, no workflow disruption.

stories.body: 🚨 BREAKTHROUGH: MIT engineers develop a breath test that detects pneumonia in minutes no X-rays, no lab wait. Just a single breath

stories.headline: Bonfires visible on SoCal beach from hotel in pajamas
stories.body: SoCal. Bonfires on the beach. From our hotel in my pajamas. We can smell the fires. So SoCal.

stories.headline: Newport Beach home listed over $12M, last sold for $750K in 1986
stories.body:
This home has a cheap “For Sale” sign in the window in Newport Beach, California

The sign says the price is over $12 million dollars

Just for fun I looked up how much this home last sold for

In 1986 they bought this home for $750,000

That means this home has gone up in value by 16x the original purchase price since the late 80’s

Yes it’s Newport Beach but this price jump is insane

It just shows how cheap homes used to be and how completely out of reach a home like this will ever be for anyone in younger generations 

They will legally never have a chance to live like this

stories.body: .@USAttyEssayli appeared on @CBSNews with @adamyamaguchi to display and discuss the illicit proceeds — homes, cars, rare baseball cards — of an Orange County man involved in a $270 million health care fraud scheme.

stories.headline: Eugene Mallove murdered after exposing cold fusion cover-up
stories.body:
In 1989 Eugene Mallove blew the whistle on the cold fusion cover up by the DoE and MIT after anomalous excess heat was reproduced dozens of times. 

In 2004 he was found murdered in his home.
